'''bazhafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacher|reacher]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacher|reacher]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bazhafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhæfæth|bæzhæfæth]] || [[word:bæzhæfæj|bæzhæfæj]] || [[word:bæzhæfæsh|bæzhæfæsh]] || [[word:bæzhæfæ|bæzhæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhazhafath|bazhazhafath]] || [[word:bazhazhafaj|bazhazhafaj]] || [[word:bazhazhafash|bazhazhafash]] || [[word:bazhazhafa|bazhazhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhafath|bazhafath]] || [[word:bazhafaj|bazhafaj]] || [[word:bazhafash|bazhafash]] || [[word:bazhafa|bazhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhaffath|bazhaffath]] || [[word:bazhaffaj|bazhaffaj]] || [[word:bazhaffash|bazhaffash]] || [[word:bazhaffaf|bazhaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhafatha|bazhafatha]] || [[word:bazhafaja|bazhafaja]] || [[word:bazhafasha|bazhafasha]] || [[word:bazhafaka|bazhafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhafath|bazhafath]] || [[word:bazhafaj|bazhafaj]] || [[word:bazhafash|bazhafash]] || [[word:bazhafa|bazhafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhafathal|bazhafathal]] || [[word:bazhafajal|bazhafajal]] || [[word:bazhafashal|bazhafashal]] || [[word:bazhafakal|bazhafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhafathatha|bazhafathatha]] || [[word:bazhafajaja|bazhafajaja]] || [[word:bazhafashasha|bazhafashasha]] || [[word:bazhafaka|bazhafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhafathan|bazhafathan]] || [[word:bazhafajan|bazhafajan]] || [[word:bazhafashan|bazhafashan]] || [[word:bazhafakan|bazhafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhafathaoro|bazhafathaoro]] || [[word:bazhafajaoro|bazhafajaoro]] || [[word:bazhafashaoro|bazhafashaoro]] || [[word:bazhafakaoro|bazhafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
